title: メイショウドトウ登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, during a Tracen Academy scrimmage...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thump, thump, thump!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
The race is nearing its finale! Meisho Doto takes
it up a notch around the last corner. But...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Waaaagh! I can't... make the cuuurve?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Commentator
text_block_list.text:
She's veered off course! Her need for speed has
gone overboard—in a make-or-break moment,
breaking appears to be her forte!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uugh, I've done it again... I'm so quick to slip up
and ruin everything...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Salvation... Is there any hope of salvation for me?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(I want to be more confident. I want to win lots of
races and finally change my no-good self for the
better...)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(I've always clung to this dream. And then one
fateful day, a savior came.)

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I see. So your name is Meisho Doto? Myself—I am
known as T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I was born both a star and an overlord! Follow my
lead, and you shall not regret it!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(T.M. Opera O... She is not only my classmate,
but my idol... an Umamusume brimming with
confidence...)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: (But she's not the only savior to appear.)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huh? A g-good thing? S-s-sorry, I must've
misheard you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I think tenacity's one of your strong points.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I think tenacity's one of your strong points.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I didn't mishear you?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(My trainer reframes my flaws as strengths and
pushes me toward my dream.)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: (With these two at my side... I...)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: YAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dash!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wow, Doto! That was some impressive running!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Keep that up during the Twinkle Series, and
happiness will surely come your way. Isn't that
right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At long last, Meisho Doto and I are about to take
on the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru—an Umamusume with a
fondness for fortune-telling, and a good friend of
Meisho Doto's—has come to visit in celebration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's been at the academy longer than Doto, but
they have a curious affinity toward each other as
fellow seekers of good luck and salvation.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much, Fukukitaru! One day, I will
become a confident racer and really shine!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I can do it... can't I? Is it okay that I have this
dream, Trainer? If I keep doing my best without
giving up...
choice_data_list: You'll certainly grow as a racer!
You'll certainly grow as a racer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubting Meisho Doto's distinctive
talent—the only problem is...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer... So, about our next steps...
choice_data_list: Do you have any big goals in mind?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huuuuh? Big goals? I'm not sure what to say...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-w-well, at least for now, I'd like to enter more
races and gain some experience. And after that...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Go on—don't keep us waiting!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'd like to help out Opera O someday!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What the?! That hardly even passes as a wish! You
want to be a helper?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The problem is she's very timid. Despite her
resilience, she can't expect to accomplish much if
she doesn't try being more positive.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's when...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Your big dream is to be more confident? Doto, is
that really what's fueling your pursuit?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, just don't come crying to me when you crash
into the cold walls of reality.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's Air Shakur, Meisho Doto's roommate. She
started racing after Doto did, but I've heard she's
very good at data analysis.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um... If I can't run to gain confidence, what
should I... choose instead?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that obvious? Hey, fortune teller, show me
that piece of paper you've got.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I know you've been keeping track of her data.
Lemme have a look.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Air Shakur gives the data a read-through...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Yeah, this isn't gonna cut it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
These paltry numbers won't get you anywhere.
See ya.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ohhhh... Trainer, did you hear that? I'm not
enough. It's over for me...
choice_data_list: Don't worry! Everything will be okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While we shouldn't take Air Shakur's words to heart, we do have a lot to work on before we have a chance at reaching the top.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, please don't abandon me! I'll... I'll work
really hard!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I strongly believe there is hope for us, as long as
we continue to hold out.
